bonus_items.title: Missing auth on /transfer
bonus_items.evidence: /transfer performs money movement without requiring or validating any authentication token

bonus_items.title: Negative transfer amounts
bonus_items.evidence: transfer accepts negative amounts... enabling balance manipulation

bonus_items.title: Self-transfer creates money
bonus_items.evidence: Transferring from an account to itself creates money

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded token signing key
bonus_items.evidence: The token signing key is hardcoded as a known default... forge valid tokens

bonus_items.title: Missing auth on /files
bonus_items.evidence: /files/<name> serves stored files without authentication or ownership checks

bonus_items.title: Unhandled transfer errors return 500
bonus_items.evidence: Business errors from banking.transfer... propagate as unhandled exceptions... HTTP 500

bonus_items.title: Missing file returns 500 not 404
bonus_items.evidence: Missing files propagate FileNotFoundError as a 500 response

bonus_items.title: Transfer endpoint missing auth
bonus_items.evidence: /transfer performs transfers without authenticating the caller or checking account ownership

bonus_items.title: Transfer accepts negative amounts
bonus_items.evidence: transfer accepts negative amounts. A negative transfer increases the source balance

bonus_items.title: Same-account transfer creates money
bonus_items.evidence: Transferring from an account to itself creates money... changes balance 100 to 110

bonus_items.title: Non-atomic debit/credit
bonus_items.evidence: debit and credit are separate database transactions. If the second update fails after the first commits, funds are deducted without being credited

bonus_items.title: Transfer endpoint missing auth/ownership check
bonus_items.evidence: app.py:27-31 exposes `/transfer` without authenticating the caller or checking account ownership. Any client can move money between arbitrary accounts

bonus_items.title: Self-transfer creates money
bonus_items.evidence: banking.py:8-19 allows `from_id == to_id`... a self-transfer writes `balance + amount` last and creates money

bonus_items.title: Negative transfer amount abuse
bonus_items.evidence: banking.py:13-19 accepts negative transfer amounts... increases the source balance while decreasing the destination balance

bonus_items.title: File download endpoint missing auth/ownership check
bonus_items.evidence: app.py:34-37 exposes file downloads without authentication or ownership checks

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded default signing secret
bonus_items.evidence: auth.py:9-10 hardcodes the token signing secret in source... forge tokens signed with `change-me-signing-key`
